channel.title: Sprint 2: New ComScore beta package
channel.description:
# Sprint 2 Review This is the summary of the Sprint 2. Bear in mind that, as it was the first one estimating story points and we don't know yet how many we're able to do in one sprint, we decided to include a lot of features to start learning. This is a summary: * Planned - 74pt * Done: 11pt. * In progress: 37pt. We estimate that 28pt aprox are already done but not released. * Not started: 35pt.
## **Released** You can find the information of the last release at [its announcement](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-release-yarn-now-works-with-frontity/1772), and we had to do [this another release](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-release-google-tag-manager-beta-package-and-other-improvements/1649) at the beginning of the sprint to fix a `critical` bug. **Bugs** * Author links don't work in frontity.org - https://github.com/frontity/frontity.org/issues/86 * Yarn isn't working - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/364
**Features** * Add `authorBase` option to wp-source - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/383
## **In progress** **Bugs** * Head Tags fails when HTML of `<head>` is malformed - https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/27 * actions.source.fetch should populate link, route, page and query even if data exists - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/365 * actions.source.fetch with "force: true" doesn't work as expected - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/340
**Features** * Create ComScore beta package - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/392 * Add publicPath option to CLI and pass it down to Webpack in both the build and dev commands - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/393
**Research** * Research - WP Comments - https://community.frontity.org/t/wordpress-comments-package/1267
## **Not started** **Features** * Add ENV variables for the build, dev and serve commands - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/394 * Slot and Fill - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-36476149 * v1 of the analytics library - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-36476178 * Smart AdServer package - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-37072939 * Google Ad Manager package - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-37073899

item.title: Sprint 2: New ComScore beta package
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Sprint 2 Review

This is the summary of the Sprint 2. Bear in mind that, as it was the first one estimating story points and we don’t know yet how many we’re able to do in one sprint, we decided to include a lot of features to start learning. This is a summary:

  • Planned - 74pt
    • Done: 11pt.
    • In progress: 37pt. We estimate that 28pt aprox are already done but not released.
    • Not started: 35pt.

Released

You can find the information of the last release at its announcement, and we had to do this another release at the beginning of the sprint to fix a critical bug.
Bugs

  • Author links don’t work in frontity.org - https://github.com/frontity/frontity.org/issues/86
  • Yarn isn’t working - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/364

Features

  • Add authorBase option to wp-source - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/383

In progress

Bugs

  • Head Tags fails when HTML of <head> is malformed - https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/27
  • actions.source.fetch should populate link, route, page and query even if data exists - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/365
  • actions.source.fetch with “force: true” doesn’t work as expected - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/340

Features

  • Create ComScore beta package - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/392
  • Add publicPath option to CLI and pass it down to Webpack in both the build and dev commands - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/393

Research

  • Research - WP Comments - WordPress comments package

Not started

Features

  • Add ENV variables for the build, dev and serve commands - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/394
  • Slot and Fill - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-36476149
  • v1 of the analytics library - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-36476178
  • Smart AdServer package - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-37072939
  • Google Ad Manager package - https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/4#card-37073899

Read full topic
